items.question_text: Under 8-8-1, the Caribbean ICAO Region ATC service follows the general oceanic procedures in Chapter 8 except when different procedures are prescribed in a _____ or letter of agreement.
items.explanation: Per 8-8-1, directives and LOAs may prescribe different procedures in the Caribbean region.

items.question_text: Under 8-8-2, vertical separation in the Caribbean ICAO Region is provided in accordance with Chapter _____, Section 8, unless this section prescribes otherwise.
items.explanation: Per 8-8-2, vertical separation follows Chapter 4, IFR, Section 8.

items.question_text: Under 8-8-3, longitudinal separation in the Caribbean ICAO Region is applied in accordance with Chapter 8, Section _____, with region-specific provisions.
Under 8-8-4, lateral separation in the Caribbean ICAO Region is applied in accordance with Chapter 8, Section _____, with region-specific provisions.
Under 8-8-5, VFR climb and descent in the Caribbean ICAO Region applies within the Houston, Miami, and San Juan _____.
items.explanation: Per 8-8-5, VFR climb and descent provisions apply in those CTAs.

items.question_text: Under 8-8-5, in the Houston, Miami, and San Juan CTAs, IFR flights may be cleared to climb or descend _____ while operating in VFR conditions.
items.explanation: Per 8-8-5, aircraft maintain own separation while VFR during climb/descent in those CTAs.
